justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'Thursday afternoon' but struggled to interpret 'two-hour' as a specific duration for booking, repeatedly searching for a two-hour slot on a single Thursday instead of offering to check other Thursdays or clarifying the exact meaning of 'two-hour session' in the context of available slots.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked about the same Thursday afternoon without offering to check other days until the final turn, leading to unnecessary back-and-forth.
